visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder top and a black skirt, stands in a brightly lit supermarket aisle in front of glass-door freezers. She speaks enthusiastically and gestures toward the freezer behind her. (2) The camera moves to a close-up of the freezer shelf, showing blue and orange boxes of "Premium Seafood Bun." A hand reaches in to touch and move one of the boxes. (3) The woman is back in the frame, now holding a box of the buns and showing it to the camera while pointing at the packaging. The background features typical retail shelving and bright overhead lights. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home or studio setting. Two women, the original one and another wearing a black beret, sit at a white table. They are holding and examining a large white steamed bun. (5) An extreme close-up shot shows a bun being pulled apart by hands, revealing a dense filling of meat, shrimp, and green herbs. Another close-up shows three whole buns on a ceramic plate. (6) Returning to the medium shot of the two women, they are eating the buns and reacting with animated facial expressions, pointing at the food and the box on the table. The lighting is soft and even.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 宏裕行新品. (2) [Variety]: 哇!! [Slogan]: 一顆40元! 值得嗎? 冷凍澎湃海鮮包. (3) [Subtitle]: 來試試看. [Subtitle]: 有沒有澎湃. (4) [Subtitle]: 澎湃這個話題度很高. (5) [Subtitle]: 很多人就是說很值得. (6) [Subtitle]: 也有人覺得還好. (7) [Subtitle]: 看來我們要吃過才知道. (8) [Variety]: 澎湃澎湃. [Subtitle]: 澎湃海鮮包. (9) [Subtitle]: 看起來裡面非常澎湃. (10) [Subtitle]: 回家來吃吃看有沒有那麼多料. (11) [Subtitle]: 你有吃過海鮮口味的包子嗎? 一箱有10顆 總共399元 所以一顆是40塊. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後微波加熱只需要700瓦兩分鐘超級快. (13) [Subtitle]: 鮮蝦花枝的占比比較多. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後主要的味道來自於它的花枝漿跟胡椒. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你想要試試看比較特別. (16) [Subtitle]: 或是比較清淡的這種海鮮口味的包子. (17) [Subtitle]: 非常推薦試試看哦. (18) [Subtitle]: 而且裡面還有干貝耶. (19) [Subtitle]: 這一顆40塊 你們覺得值得嗎 留言告訴我們.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 female passers-by in the supermarket background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair wearing a white top and black skirt; the other has dark hair and wears a black beret and a light-colored vest over a sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse with large freezer units and industrial shelving. The second location is a clean, modern indoor room with a white table and neutral-colored walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a bright, welcoming tone. Upbeat acoustic guitar-driven pop music starts simultaneously at a moderate tempo. (2) A synthetic 'whoosh' SFX triggers as the speaker emphasizes the product name. The background ambience sounds like a large indoor space. (3) The speaker's pitch rises during a question, followed by another 'whoosh' transition effect. The music remains steady in the background. (4) The acoustic texture changes slightly as two female voices interact in a conversational manner. A small 'pop' SFX accompanies a graphic change. (5) Fast-paced speech continues with clear articulation. A 'ding' SFX marks a specific highlight about the price. The music continues to provide an energetic backdrop. (6) Both female voices speak together at a high arousal level towards the end. A final 'whoosh' and a musical stinger conclude the track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and promote a new frozen seafood bun product found at Costco. It starts with an on-site discovery at the store and transitions into a home tasting session where the creators detail the price, preparation method, and flavor profile to provide a recommendation to viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a specific brand's product, mentions price and availability at a specific retailer, and includes a clear recommendation and call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media style editing with dense text overlays and fast pacing typical of short-form food review content.
